$comment: Generic address record for ANY country. Store atomic components + regionCode + languageCode. Derive labels/order/required-rules from libaddressinput metadata (address-fields.json) at render & validate time — never store those. Based on google.type.PostalAddress.

fieldReference.regionCode: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2. REQUIRED. Selects the country's format, labels and required rules.
fieldReference.languageCode: BCP-47 tag. Picks the language variant of the format (fmt vs lfmt). Optional; defaults to country's primary language.
fieldReference.addressLines: %A  ordered array of street lines (0..n). Preserves order; handles 1-3 line countries.
fieldReference.formatted: Optional cached display string rendered from the country's fmt. Convenience only — components are the source of truth.

examples.formatted:
Jordan Alvarez
1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy
Mountain View CA 94043
